svg.text: mediastreamer2 HarmonyOS 音视频处理完整流程 / OHOS AV Processing Flow
MSFilter 生命周期 Lifecycle: init → preprocess → process → postprocess → uninit
▲ 上行发送链路 TX Send Path：采集 Capture → 编码 Encode → RTP 输出 Output
🎤 音频采集/播放 Audio ohos_audio_codec/ohos_dev.cpp
detect: ohos_snd_card_detect() 注册虚拟声卡 / register virtual sound card to MSSndCardManager
读取 bufferizer PCM → 填入 OH buffer
不足时补零静音 / pad silence if underflow
process: bufferizer_put + 流量控制 flow ctrl
PCM mblk_t → outputs[0] → 下游编码滤镜 downstream encoder (Opus/PCMU)
📷 视频采集 Video Capture ohos_video_capture.cpp + ohos_video_receiver.cpp
鸡蒙相机 API / HarmonyOS Camera API
⚠ rowStride≠width 时拷贫去stride但仍用习移的srcBuffer传下游
WARNING: shifted srcBuffer passed downstream after stride-removal copy
Y平面: memcpy(planes[0], src_y, w*h) UV: 逄像素拟分 V/U / split per pixel
⚡ SIGSEGV崩溃点 CRASH: buff指针非法或长度不符 → memcpy SEGV_MAPERR
MSFilter: MSOHOSVideoCapture 视频采集滤镜
process: dupmsg(frame) → 设时间戳 set-timestamp → ms_queue_put(outputs[0])
YUV420P mblk_t → outputs[0] → 下游H.264编码滤镜 downstream H264 encoder
🎬 H.264 硬件编码 HW Encoder ohos_video_encoder.cpp + ohos_video_h264_encoder.cpp
编码数据流程 Encoder Data Flow (process 阁段)
送入硬件编码器 HW enc
OH 异步回调 Async Callbacks
OnNeedInputBuffer → CodecData::NeedInputBuffer() 入队空闲帧 / enqueue idle frame
OnNewOutputBuffer → CodecData::NewOutputBuffer() 入队已编码帧 / enqueue encoded frame
编码器和解码器各持一份 / one instance per encoder and decoder
Input 队列: 空闲帧等待 YUV 数据 / idle frames waiting for YUV
Output 队列: 已编码帧等待取出 / encoded frames waiting to fetch
NeedInputBuffer() / NewOutputBuffer() ← OH 回调线程 callback thread
GetInputBuffer() / GetOutputBuffer() ← 业务线程阻塞等待 business thread wait
fetch() 取编码输出 / retrieve encoded output
→ _psInserter->process() → NAL 单元队列 unit queue
→ 下游 RTP 打包滤镜 downstream RTP packer filter
▼ 下行接收链路 RX Receive Path：RTP 输入 → 解码 Decode → 显示/播放 Display/Playback
📥 H.264 硬件解码 HW Decoder ohos_video_decoder.cpp + ohos_video_h264_decoder.cpp
OH_VideoDecoder: 硬件解码命格 HW handle
mYUVMsg: I420 输出 output mblk_t
preprocess: initialize() ⚠ 伲俈导焰点 partner crash
initialize() + feed() 解码完整流程 / Complete Decode Flow
rfc3984_new_with_factory → CodecData → OH_VideoDecoder_CreateByMime(H264) → Configure(w/h/fmt) → Prepare → Start
送硬件解码器 HW dec
OH 回调 OnCodecFormatChange → GetFormatInfo(宽/高/stride w/h/stride)
OutputData() → ms_queue_put(outputs[0], dupmsg(mYUVMsg)) → I420 mblk_t → 显示滤镜 display filter
📺 视频显示 Video Display ohos_video_display.cpp (OpenGL ES2 + EGL + OHNativeWindow)
编译 GLSL 着色器 compile shaders (YUV 线理 texture)
ms_queue_peek_last(inputs[0]) → ms_yuv_buf_init_from_mblk() → I420 平面指针 plane ptrs
libyuv I420ToARGB() → GL 线理上传 texture upload → pjmedia_vid_dev_opengl_draw()
eglSwapBuffers() → 屏幕显示 screen | ms_queue_flush(inputs[0])
ArkTS/NAPI 传入窗口命格 → EGL Surface 重建 rebuild
ms_factory_register_filter(factory, &ms_ohos_opengl_display_desc) — 单一显式注册 only explicit register call
I420 YUV mblk_t ← inputs[0] ← OHOSVideoDecoder outputs[0] → 渡染到屏幕 render to screen
🔄 端到端数据流总览 End-to-End Data Flow Overview
RTP 打包→网络发送 RTP pack→Network TX
(上游 RTP 滤镜 upstream filter)
网络 RTP 到达 Network RTP
♪ 音频播放 Audio RX Playback
解码 PCM mblk_t (上游 upstream)
bufferizer + 流量控制 flow ctrl
